header: Perks at the studio behind Desiderio
subheadline: We invest in the things that keep people building good components for a long time.

perks.title: Health first
perks.description: Full health cover and a no-crunch policy — sustainable releases beat heroic weekends.

perks.title: Remote across Europe
perks.description: Work from anywhere in EU time zones, with a home-office budget and two team weeks a year in Vienna.

perks.title: Flexible hours
perks.description: Own your calendar. We care about shipped components and green audits, not when you clock in.

perks.title: Conference budget
perks.description: TYPO3 camps, accessibility meetups, books, and courses — a yearly budget with no approval chain.

perks.title: Open-source time
perks.description: Paid hours every week for Desiderio itself: triage issues, polish atoms, or design the next preset.

perks.title: Deep-work Fridays
perks.description: No meetings on Fridays. That is when most of the 49 components got their final polish.
